skill.name: prescriptive-actions
skill.description: Provides concise recommendations, alternatives, tradeoffs, risks, and immediate next actions for goals or problems.
skill.summary: Turns open-ended requests into clear recommended approaches and next steps.
skill.author: BellaBe

security_audit.summary: Static analysis flagged a weak cryptographic algorithm at SKILL.md:3, but the line is plain description text. No cryptographic code, scripts, network access, filesystem access, or prompt injection attempts were found in the reviewed file.

low_findings.title: Static Finding Dismissed: Weak Cryptographic Algorithm
low_findings.description: The flagged text at SKILL.md:3 is front matter describing guidance for recommendations and best approaches. No evidence found of cryptographic functions, weak algorithms, or executable code.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The file contains only Markdown guidance, and line 3 is descriptive metadata. There is no code path where a cryptographic algorithm could be invoked.

content.user_title: Get Clear Recommendations and Next Steps
content.value_statement: Open-ended requests often need clear direction before detailed planning starts. This skill helps Claude, Codex, and Claude Code recommend approaches, compare options, and identify immediate actions.
actual_capabilities: Restates the user goal in one concise sentence.
Recommends a primary approach for goals or problems.
Compares meaningful alternatives with conditions for use.
Calls out tradeoffs across cost, speed, risk, and complexity.
Lists major risks and immediate starting actions.
limitations: Does not create full roadmaps or timelines.
Does not produce detailed runbooks or exhaustive checklists.
Does not define validation criteria or tests unless separately requested.
Depends on the user providing enough context for useful advice.

use_cases.title: Choose a Product Direction
use_cases.description: Compare viable product approaches and select a practical next move.

use_cases.title: Resolve a Technical Decision
use_cases.description: Get a recommended engineering approach with alternatives and tradeoffs.

use_cases.title: Prioritize Business Actions
use_cases.description: Turn an uncertain business problem into clear next actions.

prompt_templates.title: Get Basic Advice
prompt_templates.prompt: I need to decide what to do about [situation]. Recommend the best approach and explain the tradeoffs.
prompt_templates.scenario: Use when you need a concise recommendation.

prompt_templates.title: Compare Two Options
prompt_templates.prompt: I am choosing between [option A] and [option B]. Recommend one, explain when each option fits, and list key risks.
prompt_templates.scenario: Use when two clear paths exist.

prompt_templates.title: Diagnose and Prescribe Direction
prompt_templates.prompt: Here is the problem: [context]. Diagnose the likely issue, recommend a direction, and give immediate next actions.
prompt_templates.scenario: Use when the problem is understood but the next move is unclear.

prompt_templates.title: Advise Under Constraints
prompt_templates.prompt: Given [goal], [constraints], and [risks], recommend a primary approach, alternatives, tradeoffs, assumptions, and immediate next actions.
prompt_templates.scenario: Use for complex decisions with constraints.

output_examples.input: We need to reduce customer support delays without hiring immediately.
output: Recommended approach: reduce avoidable tickets first, then improve triage.
Alternatives: automate common answers or narrow support channels.
Immediate next actions: review top ticket categories, draft response templates, and define escalation rules.

output_examples.input: Should we rebuild our onboarding flow or improve the current one?
output: Recommended approach: improve the current flow unless analytics show structural failure.
Tradeoffs: rebuilding may improve quality but adds delivery risk and delays learning.
Key risks: unclear success metrics, hidden technical debt, and scope growth.

output_examples.input: Our team disagrees on whether to pause a project.
output: Goal: decide whether the project still deserves active investment.
Recommended approach: evaluate current evidence, opportunity cost, and reversible decisions.
Immediate next actions: list decision criteria, identify missing facts, and set a decision date.

best_practices: Provide context, constraints, and the decision you need to make.
Ask for alternatives when several paths seem plausible.
Use the output as direction before requesting a detailed plan.
anti_patterns: Do not use it when you need a full timeline or roadmap.
Do not ask for exhaustive operational checklists.
Do not expect strong advice from vague or incomplete context.

faq.question: What does this skill do?
faq.answer: It helps produce recommendations, alternatives, tradeoffs, risks, and immediate next actions.

faq.question: Does it create detailed project plans?
faq.answer: No. It gives directional advice, not full roadmaps or timelines.

faq.question: Can it compare options?
faq.answer: Yes. It can explain when each option fits and recommend a primary path.

faq.question: Is it useful for technical decisions?
faq.answer: Yes. It can recommend engineering approaches when the user provides enough context.

faq.question: Does it execute commands or access files?
faq.answer: No. The reviewed skill contains Markdown instructions only.

faq.question: Which tools can use it?
faq.answer: It is marked as compatible with Claude, Codex, and Claude Code.
